prompt: Ultra-realistic editorial fashion studio photography in premium magazine campaign quality, full body. Featuring a young Asian woman with an edgy all-black style and these characteristics: slim fashionable body, short platinum blonde hair above the shoulders with black roots, straight texture, slightly messy side part, long bangs framing the face, porcelain white skin with a naturally pale tone. Ultra-detailed makeup: neatly separated spiky eyelashes with a doll-eye effect, precise eyeliner, very clear gray irises, dark red matte lips with realistic lip texture details, black nails, and a black sport watch. Facial details must be extremely sharp and in focus, with the eyes as the main focal point. Individual eyelashes should be visible one by one, with realistic skin texture and natural micro skin texture. No blur, no soft focus, no excessive smoothing, and no heavy beauty filter. Wearing an oversized black T-shirt with a “DOOM” band print, a deep black pleated long skirt, short black socks, and black Converse high-top shoes. Pose: sitting on a black folding studio stool with a round seat in a three-quarter profile pose. Right hand resting on the thigh, left hand hanging downward. Left leg bent and stepping on the stool support, right leg extended with the heel touching the floor. Face slightly lifted upward, looking toward the camera with a calm, empty, slightly melancholic expression, lips fully closed. Background and studio floor are deep dark maroon with dark gradient low-key studio lighting. Editorial studio lighting uses a diffused frontal flash and a soft beauty dish from the front left, creating clear catchlights in the eyes, very clean makeup details, realistic skin texture, and dramatic modern shadows in the style of a premium fashion magazine. Shot on Leica SL3, 50mm APO-Summicron-SL lens, ISO 100, f/5.6, RAW photo, ultra detailed, face-priority autofocus, tack-sharp eyes, razor-sharp makeup details, realistic skin pores, natural skin texture, micro contrast, ultra-clean details, cinematic editorial lighting, high contrast, subtle filmic depth, premium fashion photography, crystal-clear image quality, no blur, no haze, no soft focus, no low quality, no washed-out details, no artificial plastic skin, 8K.
